hoa_name: Carmel Valley Neighborhood 10 North Homeowners Association

pets.restrictions: Maximum of 4 household pets per unit at any one time; maximum of 2 of any one species. (Page 35)

rentals.restrictions: No explicit rental restriction found in extractable text. Board Rules and Regulations may impose additional limits.

dues.notes: Board may raise annual assessments up to 20% per year without membership approval. Special assessments capped at 5% of budgeted gross assessments for the year without a member vote. Late charges capped at 10% of delinquent amount or $10, whichever is greater. Interest on delinquent assessments not to exceed 12% annually.

parking.restrictions: Commercial Vehicles (those with business advertising) and Recreational Vehicles (motorhomes, trailers, boats, campers) subject to restrictions. Specific details partially obscured by PDF text layer artifact — same restriction pattern as West Highlands Pacific HOA (sister Pardee Homes development).

architectural_control: Architectural committee approval required before constructing or modifying any building, fence, wall, hedge, or improvement. Plans and specifications must be submitted showing location, design, and all items required under CC&Rs. Approval based on harmony of external design, location, and materials.
amendment_vote_threshold: 75% of members (standard amendments require written consent of 75% of voting power)
notes: PDF has severe dual-layer text artifact (character-level doubling from overlapping OCR and image layers). Extraction used pdfplumber + deduplication pass. Some field values may be incomplete due to text quality — recommend re-extracting with OCR override once pytesseract/poppler are confirmed working in deployment. Recorded in San Diego County by Pardee Construction Company.
extraction_method: llm (pdfplumber+dedup) — manual review from clean text
